title: OpenCompass Model Scoreboard
summary: Create a model scoreboard that packages benchmark breadth, quality regression alerts, and deployment-readiness summaries.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: OpenCompass Model Scoreboard is positioned as a Large-Scale Model Benchmarking starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Create a model scoreboard that packages benchmark breadth, quality regression alerts, and deployment-readiness summaries.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on opencompass, benchmarks, llm, evaluation.

Production differentiation focus: Wrap the upstream large-scale model benchmarking capability in a reviewable operator workflow instead of a single demo script.; Surface latency, quality, and execution traces so the system feels deployment-ready rather than experimental.; Design a distinct UI and reporting layer that makes the project portfolio-friendly and easier to explain.
why_high_score: Official or primary upstream repo with 6878 GitHub stars.
Active maintenance signal with recent push at 2026-04-14T10:59:08Z.
OpenCompass is an LLM evaluation platform, supporting a wide range of models (Llama3, Mistral, InternLM2,GPT-4,LLaMa2, Qwen,GLM, Claude, etc) over 100+ datasets.
differentiation_hooks: Wrap the upstream large-scale model benchmarking capability in a reviewable operator workflow instead of a single demo script.
Surface latency, quality, and execution traces so the system feels deployment-ready rather than experimental.
Design a distinct UI and reporting layer that makes the project portfolio-friendly and easier to explain.
